mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT QR_ID as qrId, LOCATION_ID as locationId, QR_AUTH_KEY as qrAuthKey, QR_IMAGE_URL as qrImageUrl, IS_ACTIVE as isActive, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_LOCATION_QR WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} ORDER BY IS_ACTIVE DESC, QR_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT QR_ID as qrId, LOCATION_ID as locationId, QR_AUTH_KEY as qrAuthKey, QR_IMAGE_URL as qrImageUrl, IS_ACTIVE as isActive, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM LQ_LOCATION_QR WHERE QR_AUTH_KEY = #{qrAuthKey} AND NVL(IS_ACTIVE, 1) = 1 ORDER BY QR_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_LQ_LOCATION_QR_PK.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO LQ_LOCATION_QR ( QR_ID, LOCATION_ID, QR_AUTH_KEY, QR_IMAGE_URL, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{qrId}, #{locationId}, #{qrAuthKey}, #{qrImageUrl}, #{isActive}, SYSDATE )

SELECT NVL(MAX(QR_ID), 0) + 1 FROM LQ_LOCATION_QR
INSERT INTO LQ_LOCATION_QR ( QR_ID, LOCATION_ID, QR_AUTH_KEY, QR_IMAGE_URL, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{qrId}, #{locationId}, #{qrAuthKey}, #{qrImageUrl}, #{isActive}, SYSDATE )
